milestones.title: Start New Game
milestones.description: The player selects 'New Game', views the introductory text explaining the 'Dinner Party' case, reviews the controls, and enters the game scene by pressing Start.

milestones.title: Discover Birthday Card
milestones.description: The player examines the first piece of evidence on the table, a birthday card from 'Jake' to 'Clara', establishing the victim's name and the occasion.

milestones.title: Find Letter in Drawer
milestones.description: The player opens a drawer and reads a letter from Clara's mother, providing context on Clara's relationship with Henry and suggesting she 'end things'.

milestones.title: Analyze Calendar Dates
milestones.description: The player examines the wall calendar, noting key dates including Clara's birthday (April 22), a trip to LA, and a doctor's appointment.

milestones.title: Locate Guest List
milestones.description: The player finds a handwritten guest list note identifying the attendees: Jake, Edwin, and Jenny.

milestones.title: Examine Purse Contents
milestones.description: The player unzips and searches a green purse, finding 'Fantasie Amour' matches, lipstick, and 'Nico Patch' stop-smoking aids, which helps profile the owner.

milestones.title: Discover Key Logic Note
milestones.description: The player reads a note on the fridge containing crucial logic puzzles clues: 'Cousin can't drink wine' and 'Ed is left handed'. This is essential for solving the seating arrangement.

milestones.title: Find Medical Evidence
milestones.description: The player finds a 'Benzaclin' pill bottle in the trash prescribed to Henry, with a warning label stating it causes severe liver damage if taken with alcohol.

milestones.title: Inspect Wallet and ID
milestones.description: The player examines a wallet found on a side table, viewing Henry Gibson's ID and business cards for an abortion clinic and an attorney, establishing motive and identity.

milestones.title: Scene Reconstruction Analysis
milestones.description: The player visually analyzes the dining table layout, correlating the fridge note clues (left-handed cutlery, wine vs. juice) to specific seats to deduce who sat where.

milestones.title: Submit Case Answers
milestones.description: The player returns to the laptop and inputs the deduced answers: identifying seat positions (Jake, Jenny), relationships, the victim (Clara), and the killer.

milestones.title: Level Completion
milestones.description: The player receives the final evaluation screen showing a 'Grade A+' and confirmation that 5/5 answers were correct, completing the demo scenario.
